text: {"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"2","subject":"Challenge assumptions and identify migration risks","description":"Play devil's advocate against the architecture analysis and new design. Challenge: Is the proposed architecture over-engineered? What migration risks exist (feature parity, regression, team velocity)? What's the incremental migration strategy vs big-bang rewrite? Identify hidden dependencies, data migration concerns, third-party SDK constraints (Firebase, Datadog, AppsFlyer, Amity, Freshchat). Estimate blast radius of each proposed change. Flag anything that could block or derail the reset.","assignedBy":"challenger","timestamp":"2026-03-10T05:06:37.621Z"}
